title: CAF Serie 2000 Metro Madrid - MTR4 Adapted
description: Project adapted from the original work by author JCIBravo
body:
## CAF SERIE 2000 METRO DE MADRID

**🇪🇦 ESPAÑOL//SPANISH**

Proyecto adaptado del trabajo original del autor JCIBravo a la versión MTR 4 del mod Minecraft Transit Railway

**SOLO FUNCIONA PARA MTR 4 Y SUPERIORES**
Compatibilidad con MTR 3 no probada.

Si deseas acceder al trabajo original del autor, podrás encontrarlo en [https://jcibravo.neocities.org/](https://jcibravo.neocities.org)

**🇬🇧 INGLÉS//ENGLISH**

Project adapted from the original work by author JCIBravo to MTR 4 version of the Minecraft Transit Railway mod.

**ONLY WORKS FOR MTR 4 AND ABOVE.** Compatibility with MTR 3 not tested.

If you would like to access the author's original work, you can find it at [https://jcibravo.neocities.org/](https://jcibravo.neocities.org)
